Retail estimate (wholesale × 2.5). Final pricing confirmed by Trig Modern. Made by American Leather; Trig Modern is an authorized dealer.
Construction & materials

Built by American Leather. Loose seat and back cushions with high-resiliency foam standard; Down and Trillium fills are available upgrades, priced per seat.

Cushion detail comes Plain, Tufted, or Knife-Edge. Seat and back cushion height each offer a taller option (+2").

Coverings & samples

Make it yours in leather or fabric — including performance covers. Coverings are grade-priced, so the cover you pick sets the final number.

The grades shown are a curated spread; AL's full library runs deeper. Note the look you're after and Trig will pull swatches to mail or set aside in the showroom.

Dimensions, lead time & warranty

Exact dimensions depend on the silhouette and options you choose and are confirmed by Trig on your quote.

Ships through American Leather; lead time depends on your cover and current production. Backed by AL's limited lifetime warranty on the frame and suspension.

Request your configuration

Sent — Trig Modern will follow up. You can close this window.
